mapper.sql: id, title, poster, description, director, release_year, runtime, rating, view_count, video_url, is_free, status, create_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM movie WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT m.
FROM movie m INNER JOIN movie_category mc ON m.id = mc.movie_id WHERE mc.category_id = #{categoryId} AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.rating DESC, m.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT
FROM movie WHERE status = 1 AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR director LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 1 WHEN director LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, rating DESC, create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie m INNER JOIN movie_category mc ON m.id = mc.movie_id WHERE mc.category_id = #{categoryId} AND m.status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM movie WHERE status = 1 AND ( title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR director LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
SELECT category_id FROM movie_category WHERE movie_id = #{movieId}
mapper.update: UPDATE movie SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM movie WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY rating DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT
FROM movie WHERE is_free = 1 AND status = 1 ORDER BY rating DESC, view_count DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT
FROM movie WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY view_count DESC, rating DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
